args.question: Deleting ALL emails is a major destructive action — this could remove thousands of messages across all labels (after moving to Trash, where they stay 30 days). Are you sure you want to delete everything, or did you mean something more specific?
options: Yes, delete ALL emails in my inbox
Delete only the emails currently visible on this page
Delete emails matching a specific search (e.g. old emails, promotions)
args.reason: Deleting all emails is irreversible in practice and could affect thousands of messages. I want to make sure this is what you really want.
